description: Legal query (in a different hand than recto) concerning the case of a widow holding a statement of trustworthiness, who had declared that she possessed none of her husband's possessions. She refused to let the elders into her house as she had been advised, but later opened the door after all. However, the inventory was not taken away. (Information from Mediterranean Society, III, p. 255, and from Goitein's index cards.) NB: This used to be called T-S 10J21.16 on PGP.
tags: Responsum, legal query, widow, Halfon b. Menashshe
description_he: שאלה משפטית בנוגע לאלמנה המחזיקה הצהרת נאמנות, שהצהירה שאין בידה מנכסי בעלה. היא סירבה בתחילה לאפשר לזקנים לבוא לביתה, אך בסופו של דבר פתחה את הדלת.
